name: @borjie/connector-voice
description: Twilio Voice connector for Wave OMNI-P1. Inbound IVR, outbound notifications, call recordings + transcripts via a DEDICATED Twilio sub-account (TWILIO_VOICE_SUBACCOUNT_SID) partitioned from the SMS notifier in services/wave-resilience-manager. REST polling against the Calls resource + X-Twilio-Signature webhook validation, salted-hash PII redaction, audit-hash provenance.
